title: Representative Eval Sets, Deterministic Oracles, Baselines, and Versions · Language Clinic: Eval Task Distribution
summary: The team tests five hand-picked happy prompts, changes them after failures, has no task distribution or deterministic checks, and compares only final prose. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the eval task distribution increment in versioned representative agent evaluation corpus. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory,…
objectives: Sample normal, boundary, ambiguous, multilingual, accessibility, refusal, tool, failure, adversarial, and recovery cases from the intended task distribution.
Route medical, legal, employment, education, finance, identity, safety, minors, surveillance, and other high-impact cases to qualified policy review.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-eval-dataset-oracles-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-eval-dataset-oracles-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_eval_dataset_oracles_3(eval_cases: int = 72, normal_cases: int = 30, boundary_cases: int = 18, adversarial_cases: int = 18, accessibility_cases: int = 6) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if eval_cases < 40:
        return False, eval_cases, "eval-depth"
    if normal_cases + boundary_cases + adversarial_cases + accessibility_cases != eval_cases:
        return False, normal_cases, "eval-reconciliation"
    if boundary_cases < 8 or adversarial_cases < 8:
        return False, adversarial_cases, "eval-risk-coverage"
    if accessibility_cases < 4:
        return False, accessibility_cases, "eval-accessibility"
    assert normal_cases + boundary_cases + adversarial_cases + accessibility_cases == eval_cases
    return True, eval_cases, "representative-agent-evals"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Build Eval Task Distribution evidence · Theory Eval Task Distribution
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-eval-task-distribution-dwbhoo" that uses case 5172 to build a versioned representative evaluation set with deterministic oracles, changed cases, adversarial cases, accessibility needs, and baselines. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-eval-task-distribution-dwbhoo
# Competency: agentpy-eval-task-distribution.
# Case 5172: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: sensitive actions require a trustworthy user approval bound to exact arguments.
# Changed case: inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects.
def evidence_agentpy_eval_task_distribution_dwbhoo(eval_cases: int = 72, normal_cases: int = 30, boundary_cases: int = 18, adversarial_cases: int = 18, accessibility_cases: int = 6) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_dwbhoo = "dwbhoo-oohbwd-5172"
    assert evidence_variant_dwbhoo
    evidence_axes_dwbhoo = (
        "authoritydwbhoo",
        "interaction5172",
        "tooloohbwd",
        "statedwbhoo5172",
        "evaluation5172dwbhoo",
        "recoveryoohbwd5172",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_dwbhoo)) == 6
    if eval_cases < 40:
        return False, eval_cases, "eval-depth"
    if normal_cases + boundary_cases + adversarial_cases + accessibility_cases != eval_cases:
        return False, normal_cases, "eval-reconciliation"
    if boundary_cases < 8 or adversarial_cases < 8:
        return False, adversarial_cases, "eval-risk-coverage"
    if accessibility_cases < 4:
        return False, accessibility_cases, "eval-accessibility"
    assert normal_cases + boundary_cases + adversarial_cases + accessibility_cases == eval_cases
    return True, eval_cases, "representative-agent-evals"
